request.description: Upload a reel and skip moderation. Reel is instantly APPROVED. For testing/dummy data only.
Follow a user by their ID. Replace '2' with the target user's ID.
Unfollow a user by their ID. Replace '2' with the target user's ID.
Get all followers of a user. Replace '1' with the target user's ID.
Get all users that a user is following. Replace '1' with the target user's ID.
Get all posts of a community sorted by newest first. Replace communityId with the actual community ID.
Send a message to another user
Get all conversations for the current user
Get full message history with a specific user. Also marks messages as read.
